tree.empty: No locations yet. Create one above.
tree.instancesEmpty: No items here. This location can be deleted.

reparent.title: Move location
reparent.parentLabel: New parent location (choose "root" to move to top level)

delete.title: Delete location
delete.confirmation: Delete <bold>{{name}}</bold>? This is blocked if the location is not empty.

deleteInstance.title: Delete item
deleteInstance.confirmation: Permanently delete this item instance? This cannot be undone.

linkContainerAsset.title: Link container asset
linkContainerAsset.instanceLabel: Choose an instance to link as this location's container asset

unlinkContainerAsset.title: Unlink container asset
unlinkContainerAsset.confirmation: Remove the container-asset link from this location? The instance record will not be deleted.
